message:
feat: integrate ContactResolver into SyncEngine with Info.plist

- SyncEngine resolves phone-number chat titles to contact names for
  iMessage chats using the macOS Contacts framework
- Add resolvedTitle field to ChatMetadata (raw title preserved for
  traceability)
- Embed Info.plist with NSContactsUsageDescription for TCC prompt
- Package.swift uses linker flags to embed plist in __TEXT/__info_plist
- ContactResolver is injectable for testability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,15 @@ let package = Package(
     targets: [
         .executableTarget(
             name: "beeper-message-sync",
-            path: "Sources/BeeperMessageSync"
+            path: "Sources/BeeperMessageSync",
+            linkerSettings: [
+                .unsafeFlags([
+                    "-Xlinker", "-sectcreate",
+                    "-Xlinker", "__TEXT",
+                    "-Xlinker", "__info_plist",
+                    "-Xlinker", "Sources/Resources/Info.plist",
+                ]),
+            ]
         ),
         .testTarget(
             name: "BeeperMessageSyncTests",

@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ struct ChatMetadata: Codable {
     let accountId: String
     let network: String
     let title: String
+    let resolvedTitle: String?
     let type: String
     let participants: [ParticipantInfo]
     let firstSeen: String
@@ -42,6 +43,7 @@ struct MetadataWriter {
                 accountId: metadata.accountId,
                 network: metadata.network,
                 title: metadata.title,
+                resolvedTitle: metadata.resolvedTitle,
                 type: metadata.type,
                 participants: metadata.participants,
                 firstSeen: existing.firstSeen,

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
+<plist version="1.0">
+<dict>
+	<key>CFBundleIdentifier</key>
+	<string>com.primeradiant.beeper-message-sync</string>
+	<key>NSContactsUsageDescription</key>
+	<string>Beeper Message Sync uses your contacts to resolve phone numbers to names in chat titles.</string>
+</dict>
+</plist>

@@ -28,7 +28,8 @@ final class SyncEngineTests: XCTestCase {
                 "BEEPER_URL": config.beeperURL,
                 "LOG_DIR": tmpDir!,
                 "STATE_FILE": stateFile,
-            ])
+            ]),
+            contactResolver: ContactResolver()
         )
 
         do {
@@ -52,7 +53,8 @@ final class SyncEngineTests: XCTestCase {
                 "BEEPER_URL": config.beeperURL,
                 "LOG_DIR": tmpDir!,
                 "STATE_FILE": stateFile,
-            ])
+            ]),
+            contactResolver: ContactResolver()
         )
 
         let chats: ChatListResponse
